title: HasanAbi breaks silence after Cuba outfit backlash as Cartier glasses debate sparks fresh controversy online
summary_full: Hasan Piker responded to criticism over his clothing during his Cuba visit, saying people misunderstood the situation. He explained that many items are gifted or sent to him. Social media users had questioned the cost of his outfit. Hasan denied the claims and said linking his clothes to Cuba’s problems does not make sense.
